arts.ttl: PSG predicted XI v PSV: Vitinha to be dropped?
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain don’t have any fresh injury concerns as they prepare to face PSV Eindhoven in the UEFA Champions League on Tuesday night, however, Luis Enrique does have some decisions…

arts.ttl: PSG vs PSV Eindhoven: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain are aiming to return to winning ways in the Champions League as they face Eredivisie champions PSV Eindhoven in the French capital on Tuesday night. PSG, like PSV, lead their domestic league but the likes of Monaco and Marseille are also competing fiercely at the summit.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti Takes Subtle Swipe at Luis Enrique in Latest Remarks
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain manager Luis Enrique had Real Madrid standout Kylian Mbappé for one season, and a recent video of him coaching the Frenchman went viral. Last season in the UEFA Champions League, Enrique had a video coaching session with the 25-year-old while analyzing the match against FC Barcelona. arts.ttl: Luis Enrique Reveals Which Real Madrid Star Deserves to Win Ballon D’Or
arts.sum: The Ballon d’Or will be presented this month, and there’s no clear-cut favorite to win the honor. Nonetheless, while speaking to TNT Sports Brazil, Paris Saint-Germain manager Luis Enrique shared who he thinks will win the honor. arts.ttl: PSG, Tottenham Alerted as Sporting Chief Discusses Chelsea Target’s Potential January Move
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain opted not to pursue a No. 9 this past summer window, giving Randal Kolo Muani and Gonçalo Ramos a vote of confidence. However, the Frenchman’s name is in the rumor mill in recent days which means that the Parisians could pursue a striker next year. arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford future: German giants 'to rival' PSG for Man United forward
arts.sum: German giants Bayern Munich are reportedly preparing to rival Paris Saint-Germain for Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Suffer Transfer Setback as PSG Defender Set to Stay
arts.sum: This past summer, Paris Saint-Germain right-back Achraf Hakimi was cited as a potential target for Real Madrid to replace veteran Dani Carvajal in the long term. Moreover, the reporting reveals that the Ligue 1 team are still considering swooping for Rashford next year. arts.ttl: Liverpool Star Reveals Mega Contract Demand Amid PSG Interest, Sources Claim
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah’s future at Liverpool is uncertain, as his current contract expires next June. Recent rumors have linked him to Paris Saint-Germain, but he may still stay at Anfield. arts.ttl: PSG Prepared to Increase €10M Annual Salary for Chelsea-Linked Player at Inter Milan
